title: EAMBRITE Battery-Operated Snowy Twig Tree Lights with 24 Warm White LEDs Tabletop Christmas Tree Decor for Indoor use (60cm/2ft)
features: 🎄ELEGANT TWIG TREE: 60cm high with a solid base and 24 warm white LEDs, giving you the festive feel when lit
🎄SNOW FLOCKED XMAS TREE: Comes with realistic looking brown branches and trunk all of which are covered in a dusting of snow
🎄FLEXIBLE BRANCH: Easily and safely bendable for DIY crafting, shape to your perfect look and dress your tree with your ornaments
🎄BATTERY POWERED: 3AA batteries (not included) with on/off switch on bottom of the base
🎄WIDELY USED: Light up or not, perfect for your theme and occasion party, also as night light and table decoration for indoor use
description: Product Description EAMBRITE – Making Your Holiday’s Merry and Full of Joy DISCOVER EAMBRITE EAMBRITE is made up of a team of skilled Christmas light experts who use their love of the holiday and the cheer it brings to people around the world with high-quality Christmas lights. It’s this devotion to the craft and unique designs that has given EAMBRITE its international reputation as the leading supplier of holiday themed lights and products. Specification: More wooden like tree Tree height: 2 FT(60cm) Total LED bulbs: 24 LT LED Color：Warm White Base size：10cm*10cm Net Weight: 0.65lbs(0.3kg) Packing list: 2FT 24 LEDs Snow Tree with Lights *1 Instruction Mannual* 1 Features: As table decoration or night lights. Add a bit of natural ambiance with a warm, white glow to your home As a wedding decoration or shooting props is a creative ideas Add a bit of natural ambiance with a warm, white glow to your home/Restaurant/Party
